our might, our power (as object of أَحَسُّوا)

this one (points to something specific in this ayah)
we sent you (object of وَمَآ - and not)
for the worlds/all creation (object of رَحْمَةً)
to me (receiving what يُوحَىٰٓ is revealed)
indeed only/just (introduces what يُوحَىٰٓ is revealed)
one, single (describing إِلٰهٌ 'god' in this ayah)
those who submit/surrender (to Allah) (answering: فَهَلْ أَنتُم - 'then are you?')
they turned themselves away (from the truth)
equally (describing how the announcement in ءَاذَنتُكُمْ was made)
or (connecting to أَقَرِيبٌ - is it near)
far away (referring to something not specified yet)
indeed he/it (subject of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
he knows (what is said openly in ٱلْجَهْرَ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ)
the open speech (object of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
the speech (object of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
and he knows (connected to يَعْلَمُ in previous ayah)
you (all) hide (something secretly) (subject of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
and if/whether (introduces uncertainty about أَدْرِى/I know)
I know (in response to وَإِنْ - and if)
perhaps he/it (referring to what was mentioned)
a time, a period (after إِلَىٰ meaning 'until')
The Most Merciful (as a divine name of Allah)
The One whose help is sought (predicate of رَبُّنَا)
